summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GRM Export feature. Backend: 13/14 tests passed (1 skipped - GRM format already validated). Frontend: All UI elements verified working correctly. The Export GRM feature is fully functional.
passed_tests: POST /api/instances/export-grm - returns grm_content, grm_lines_count, invoiced_count, orders_created
GRM text format validation - pipe-delimited with correct fixed fields (1|1.0|T008|RC|YYYYMMDD|...)
CONSUMED(5) to INVOICED(6) status transition after export
Replacement orders creation per supplier with status='sent'
ProductInstance ORDERED items created for each replacement order
GET /api/instances/consumption returns PICKED and CONSUMED instances only
PUT /api/instances/{id}/consume marks PICKED instance as CONSUMED
POST /api/instances/export-grm returns 400 when no CONSUMED instances
Frontend Consumption page loads correctly with Exporter GRM button
Exporter GRM button is disabled when 0 consumed products
Orders page shows replacement orders in 'En attente de réception' section
seed_data_creation: Created test data with TEST_GRM_ prefix: supplier, product (with grm_number), order, instances. Full workflow tested: order → send → receive → place → pick → consume → export GRM.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GRM Export feature is fully functional. The workflow is: 1) PICKED instances are marked as CONSUMED via PUT /api/instances/{id}/consume, 2) Export GRM via POST /api/instances/export-grm generates pipe-delimited text file, creates replacement orders per supplier (status='sent'), and transitions instances from CONSUMED(5) to INVOICED(6). Movement records with type='facturation' are created. Frontend Consumption page shows picked/consumed instances with 'Consommer' button for PICKED items and 'Exporter GRM' button (disabled when 0 consumed). Orders page shows replacement orders in 'En attente de réception' section.

replacement_orders.creation: One order per supplier with status='sent'
replacement_orders.instances: ORDERED instances created for each product

frontend_orders_page.pending_section: 'En attente de réception' shows sent/partially_received orders
